creator: adrian@thearle.com.au
text:
I forgot to mention that this port requries spanDSP 0.0.5pre3 to build, 
which requries that ports/124118 
<http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/124118> be acted on 
first. I can also be the maintainer for that as it seems like there 
might be a maintainer timeout...

If someone could also change my email address for this bug to just 
adrian@thearle.com.au then I might actually get the responses... 
adrian@albert.thearle.com.au seems to black hole at the moment... :(
